_comment: Official Slack MCP server (hosted, OAuth). Read-only is credential-enforced — grant the Slack app read (search/history) scopes only; never send/schedule. Set oauth.clientId to your Slack client id. Codex needs a top-level mcp_oauth_callback_port (see SETUP.md). Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
